text: Supreme {{grapefruit}} and {{orange}} over a bowl, reserving the citrus segments and at least 3 tablespoons of the collected juices.
In a small bowl, whisk 3 tablespoons of the reserved citrus juices with {{olive_oil}}, {{salt}}, and {{black_pepper}}.
Trim, halve, and core {{fennel}}, then thinly slice it.
In a large serving bowl, combine the sliced fennel, {{arugula}}, and the citrus segments from the grapefruit and orange.
Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss to combine. Sprinkle with {{mint}} and serve.
